title: Saadaal Isku-xiran oo 3-Geesood ah
askPrompt: Saadaashayda isku-xiran ee 3-geesoodka ah waxay muujinaysaa: {summary}. Isbeddelka koritaanka dakhliga: {growth}% bishii-bishii. Waa maxay khataraha aan ka feejignaan lahaa iyo sidee baan ku hagaajin karaa saadaalladan?
waterfallIntro: Sida lacagtu uga socoto P&L-kaaga iyada oo maraysa isbeddellada raasumaalka shaqada ilaa hadhaagaaga dhammaadka.
scenarioIntro: Hagaaji malooyinka oo arag sida isbeddelladu ugu faafaan dhammaan saddexda bayaanka maaliyadeed.
howConnectTitle: Sida saddexda bayaan ay isugu xiran yihiin
howConnectBody: Faa'iidada saafiga ah ee P&L waxay geli socodka lacagta. Socodka lacagta waxaa loo hagaajiyaa raasumaalka shaqada (marka aad dakhli soo ururiso vs biilasha bixiso). Hadhaaga lacagta dhammaadka wuxuu geli xaashida miisaanka oo ay la socdaan lacagaha la sugayo iyo lacagaha la bixinayo.
